name: wallet-profiler
description: Comprehensive on-chain wallet profiler with tiered pricing. Basic: balances + risk score. Standard: + USD prices + DeFi + activity. Premium: + natural language summary. Supports Ethereum, Base, and Arbitrum. Spam token detection included at all tiers.

address.description: Wallet address (0x...) or ENS name (e.g. vitalik.eth)

tier.description: Service tier: basic (0.0005 ETH), standard (0.001 ETH), premium (0.003 ETH). Defaults to standard.
